title: laggera crassifolia
intro: Laggera crassifolia, also known as African tea or bush tea, is a perennial herb native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Laggera crassifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Laggera crassifolia include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
